title: Trinity Accord Record-Chain Preflight Response
description: Schema for responses from the /record-chain/preflight endpoint. A preflight validates a submission without persisting it. It returns diagnostics, warnings, and route detection to help submitters fix issues before calling submit.

accepted.description: True if the submission passed all preflight validation checks. False means there are blocking diagnostics that must be fixed before submit.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the preflight validation was performed.

validation_duration_ms.description: Time taken to perform the validation in milliseconds.

would_accept.description: Indicates whether the gateway would accept this submission if it were sent to the submit endpoint. Equivalent to 'accepted' but scoped to the persistence decision.

validator_version.description: Version string of the validation engine that processed this preflight.

route_detected.description: The record route the gateway detected based on the submission's record_type and content. May differ from declared record_type if the gateway infers a different route.

record_type.description: The record_type as declared in the submission.

submission_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonicalized submission JSON. Used to correlate preflight and submit calls.

received_raw_body_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw HTTP request body as received by the gateway, before any parsing or canonicalization.

diagnostics.description: List of diagnostic findings. Each entry describes a specific validation result. An empty array means no issues found.

warnings.description: Non-blocking observations the submitter should be aware of. Warnings do not prevent submission but may indicate best-practice violations.

gateway_schema.description: The schema identifier the gateway used to validate this submission.

diagnostic-entry.title: Diagnostic Entry
diagnostic-entry.description: A single diagnostic finding from preflight validation.

severity.description: Severity level. 'error' blocks submission; 'warning' and 'info' do not.

field_path.description: JSON Pointer to the field that triggered this diagnostic, e.g. '/authorship_proof/signature_base64'. Omitted for global diagnostics.

context.description: Additional structured context for the diagnostic, e.g. expected vs actual values.

warning-entry.title: Warning Entry
warning-entry.description: A non-blocking warning from preflight validation.

field_path.description: JSON Pointer to the field related to this warning.

recommendation.description: Suggested action to resolve or mitigate this warning.

gateway-runtime.title: Gateway Runtime Info
gateway-runtime.description: Metadata about the gateway instance that processed this preflight.

version.description: Semantic version of the gateway software.

instance_id.description: Opaque identifier for the specific gateway instance (for debugging and log correlation).

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the gateway processed this request.

region.description: Deployment region of the gateway instance, e.g. 'us-east-1'.

response-boundary.title: Response Boundary
response-boundary.description: Boundary declarations included in every gateway response.

not_authority.description: This response does not constitute or claim authority.

not_governance.description: This response does not constitute a governance action.

not_attestation.description: This response is not an attestation by the gateway or any party.

not_successor_reception.description: This response does not receive or validate any successor claim.

not_amendment.description: This response does not amend any existing record.

bitcoin_originals_prevail.description: Bitcoin-original records prevail in any conflict.
